# Test basic server interaction with proper piping

# Create the initialization request in a file
stdin init.json
exec npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-everything stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"result"'

-- init.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"TestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
